gold.role: Primary signature color for stage-light accents, premium highlights, headings and key details

graphite.role: Main dark background and theatrical base

graphiteLight.role: Secondary dark surface for cards, panels and layered depth

terracotta.role: Warm accent for emotional emphasis and secondary calls to action

offWhite.role: Light background, text on dark surfaces and print-friendly breathing space

gray.role: Secondary text, metadata, dividers and quiet interface states
